title: lepidium grandifructum
intro: Lepidium grandifructum, also known as desert cress, is a plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Lepidium grandifructum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal supplements to support overall well-being.
